items.topic_thesis: To found trust without building a cult, leaders must transgress, recognize, release, and submit.
items.angle: Do not summarize the news; diagnose the pattern underneath it.
items.hook: Most people are misreading what this story is actually about. to found trust without building a cult, leaders must transgress, recognize, release, and submit.

items.topic_thesis: Hard Limits on Liminality prevent ritual heat from spilling into ordinary domination.
items.angle: Start with a recurring problem and end with a usable move.
items.hook: If your team keeps repeating the same failure, stop adding process. hard limits on liminality prevent ritual heat from spilling into ordinary domination.

items.topic_thesis: Crimes Against Ren are real because truth can still be weaponized against the substrate that makes truth possible.
items.angle: Name the concept, explain it plainly, and show why it matters now.
items.hook: The mistake leaders keep making is thinking crimes against ren are real because truth can still be weaponized against the substrate that makes truth possible.

items.topic_thesis: Overflow does quadratic damage when melt outruns capacity.
items.angle: Make the pattern recognizable fast and show what drives it.
items.hook: You can tell a team is drifting into theater when overflow does quadratic damage when melt outruns capacity.

items.topic_thesis: The catechumenate comes before the high-heat rite.
items.angle: Name the misuse clearly and show the cost of getting it wrong.
items.hook: A practice can look rigorous and still make the system worse. the catechumenate comes before the high-heat rite.
